review_summary.college_name: Sri Chundi Ranganayakulu Engineering College (SCREC) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It provides quality education with good placement support.

content.Placements: Our college placements are not bad. I am from a CSE background. In my department, nearly 70% of students get placed. The top recruiting companies offered in my course are Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc. Nearly 60% of students got internship opportunities in companies such as TCS and a few startups.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is quite good. The hostel facility is also provided by our college management. Girls' hostel is inside the campus, and boys' hostel is outside with basic furniture and a 24-hour water and electricity supply. The food in the mess is average. Medical facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, and there were good placements before I joined the college.

content.Placements: My college had no placements at the time when we passed out. After that, our junior batch is the last in the B.Tech campus.
content.Infrastructure: In my opinion, the campus is great. We have a good computer lab, and it is big. As for the hostel, I'm not a hostel student, but I spent some of the days with my friends. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel, but apart from that, the food is good, and the rooms are spacious. There is a big library that contains a lot of books.
content.Faculty: There are only 3-4 lecturers at my branch in the final year. But the lecturers who teach us are well knowledgeable and teach us so many things inside and outside the subject. The teachers are very helpful. Every teacher who teaches us is excellent, very easy to communicate with, and they help us a lot. They are very knowledgeable, and their teaching quality is great. The exams are conducted under JNTUK, and the exams are a little bit hard, but we manage them. All thanks to the teachers, they provide extra materials and the previous question papers with the answers. I got 7.55 CGPA, and the pass percentage of our class is almost 70%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is very good .

content.Placements: 75% of students get placement from college, and the highest package is INR 30 lacs, the average package is INR 20 lacs, and the lowest package is INR 10 lacs. The top recruiters are Apollo Tires Careers, Nestle India Careers, Honda Careers, HCL, Yatra Online Pvt. Ltd. Careers, Just Dial Careers, etc., and 49% of students get internships with better experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very nice when compared to other colleges. The library has very good maintenance. The hostel rooms are very good. In our college, the medical facilities are very nice, but the labs are working properly on the skill development of the students to make their future better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I was absolutely satisfied with the college placements.

content.Placements: In our college, the placements were good. So many seniors had got jobs in many companies and so many seniors get well settled in their life after getting jobs. Some fake companies visited our campus and took our interviews. After selection when we go to the company, no company was found. Some companies had taken bond paper for 2 years and treat us like worker not an employee.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there were two boys' hostels and one girls' hostel. Food was provided thrice daily and Sundays also. For the room, we have to pay Rs.1000 a month. So many students came in the last few months to study well. The facilities were very good and the food was also healthy and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: There are good facilities and good opportunities.

content.Placements: Our course was civil engineering, and now there are many opportunities in this branch. The starting salary offered was Rs. 50,000 per month. I am thankful to our college.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, labs are available in all departments such as mechanical, civil and computers. All departments have good lab facilities. There is also a library where all books are available. Every free time we read books. Our hostel is amazing. The food served is also super, and once every week, chicken is available. Bedrooms are also clean, and there are 24 hours of water facility. Beds are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is one of the best colleges in India. I recommend others to take admission to this college.

content.Placements: About 20% of students were placed from our course. The salary package offered was 1 LPA. About 80% of students got internships from our course. I have taken admission in B.Tech in computer science and engineering because I think it is the future demand of the private sector in the country.
content.Infrastructure: There are completely air-conditioned classrooms here. All the qualities of the hostel are fabulous. There are all the facilities like a canteen, games, sports, etc. Curricular activities are also available in this college. They really inspire students in every way. I really love this.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: If you want a good future, please don't take admission in BITS.

content.Placements: I'm from the 2010-2014 batch, and there were 150 students in the mechanical branch. None of the students was placed from the campus. Even our seniors were not placed. None of the companies visited our campus for placements. Indian army visited our campus for recruitment. Even after that, the placement record of the campus was 0%. There is no placement cell. We have to get industrial training opportunities on our own. They don't even conduct any industry visits.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are of good quality. But there is no Wi-Fi facility available in computer labs. We can't even use computers in our spare time. The library is nice, and we can get all the books related to our study there. However, we can't borrow more than 3 books from the library. There is a peaceful atmosphere in the library to study. Medical facilities are provided here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is not a good for your career.

content.Placements: No placement was provided in any company. Passed out students were very less. Don't waste time joining this college. Internships are very less. The salary offered is very low at Rs. 6,000 per month. The life of pass out students and their carrier got worst by joining this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good enough for engineering college. Wi-Fi was not available. Labs, libraries and classrooms on the campus were good. The hostel was the worst. A room had to be shared by six students. The food served was good. Other facilities provided were also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: There are good faculty members. There are poor facilities.

content.Placements: There are almost zero placements in our course. The salary offered for the other department students is Rs. 9,000 per month. Cognizant is the top recruiter. Programmer analyst trainee is the role offered. None of the students got internships while I was studying in our course.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi. There is a good library, but it is of no use as teachers do not give free time. There are goods labs. But there is no good canteen. I don't know about the hostel because I was a day scholar. Facility wise, it is not bad. But not good interiors in the hostel. They encourage some sports, and students' skills were good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the placements. Faculty members are good.

Hostel rooms are okay to stay in. Food provided there is a major problem. Breakfast provided is the food cooked last night. Major machines are present in the college, but the fact is that they are not working.

individual_reviews.title: An average college, the worst placements, and average classes.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Not worth for knowledgeable students.

content.Placements: No placement are provided on our campus. The hostel is waste regarding placements. They'll suggest only off-campus, only BPO and non-core companies were suggested. The job opportunity through this college is very low. Regarding the job wise, the college is very poor.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is poor. The campus is small, and buildings are not maintained well. No renovative works have been done to them. There is lack of facilities. The books available in the libraries are a few. Labs are not well-maintained so far.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sai Spurthi Institute of Technology (SSIT, Khammam).

reviews.review_heading: It provides the best learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Our department is well-equipped with modern classrooms, digital learning tools, and a vast library offering access to international business journals. Wi-Fi connectivity is strong and labs are designed for financial modeling, business analytics, and marketing simulation. The hostel provides a comfortable stay with 24x7 Wi-Fi, laundry service, and a dedicated study zone. The mess provides food but many students prefer exploring the various food outlets and cafes on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: My review on college for MBA.
reviews.review_text: The MBA department has modern classrooms, projectors, and high-speed Wi-Fi. The library is well-stocked with books on management, finance, and marketing. Hostels are comfortable with clean rooms, laundry service, and common study areas. The mess food is average but canteen offers better options. There is a medical centre. Students have access to sports facilities like football, cricket, and gym workouts.

reviews.review_heading: View of Anni College to You.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a Wi-Fi-free campus. Classrooms have smart boards for interactions. The library has more than a thousand books and journals. Hostel rooms have light, fan, bed, water, food, etc. The canteen is poor, offering only samosas and puffs. Medical facilities are available. Sports has an individual in-charge to encourage and participate.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching faculty is nice and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The classrooms are neat and clean with comfortable benches. We have a number of computer labs. The library has a good number of books available. The Wi-Fi is enabled with high-speed internet. The hostel facilities are available. The canteen is also available. The medical facilities are good. The sports ground is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and Good Faculty .
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college are good. Many facilities, like high-range Wi-Fi, are available. Classrooms are large, and libraries are well-stocked with books in all fields. Many libraries are available in our college. Labs are well-equipped with all the necessary equipment. Hostel facilities are good, and the mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the best college for MBA.
reviews.review_text: The college has world-class infrastructure with state-of-the-art lab facilities, and the entire campus is equipped with free Wi-Fi. There are facilities for both outdoor and indoor activities, and a well-equipped gym is also available. Hostels for both boys and girls offer large rooms with attached bathrooms and a spacious dining area. The food quality is very good, with both North Indian and South Indian dishes available.

reviews.review_heading: The best experience of my life .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good; classes are spacious and well maintained. All the necessary facilities, like medical facilities and sports facilities, are available on campus. Wi-Fi facilities are available on the whole campus, and in hostels, the food is also hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with average placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good and hygienic infrastructure. It has an average library in the science block with well-maintained books. Arts students have to go to the science block for books. Lab facilities are good. Classrooms are huge and ventilated. It has a sports club.

reviews.review_heading: A good and disciplined college in the Thanjavur city.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have good projectors and free Wi-Fi. The infra is good in technical labs and library. There is an auditorium as well. Hostel is available for both boys and girls. Food is good in the canteen. A sports ground is available for football, basketball and tennis.

reviews.review_heading: The college and facilities aren't the best, but they are good.

But the seats aren't very comfortable and neither are the benches. The cafeteria is also just okay and not the best.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the institute. It is pocket friendly and has a great environment.
reviews.review_text: The institution has decent infrastructure and all the labs have decent equipment. Every class has its own smart board and provides AC for better comfort and great learning. The mess and canteen foods are great. Hostel rooms are also very comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Gateway college is better than all the colleges in Sonipat.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities are provided to the students, such as a library, Wi-Fi, labs, etc. The infrastructure is above average. The classrooms are good. The quality of the facilities is good. The food in the mess is fresh and healthy. All types of sports and games are in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements with notable recruiters but mixed opinion on faculty quality and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was neither too good nor too bad; it was average. The college provides Wi-Fi. Every classroom has AC, and the library is also good. The teaching style of faculty members is good, but Gateway gives very few holidays. Still, I would say it is one of the best colleges in Sonipat.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the colleges infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the time period of college duration. Labs are in very good condition. In this, our college provides 4-5 labs and all are fully AC. Each and every classroom is in good condition and has digital boards with ventilation and centralized AC. Our library got good infrastructure and provides various books and magazines available to every student, and proper decorum is maintained by the faculty members of the library.

reviews.review_heading: Gateway Institute of Engineering & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average. The classrooms and library are good, and Wi-Fi is available, although it's not very reliable. The canteen offers fresh food at reasonable prices, and the sports facilities are decent, but there are no medical facilities available, as there is no dispensary on campus.

reviews.review_heading: A good way to see the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Also, the main thing is that the library of the college is very attractive. The hostel facility is not very good; the food provided to the hostellers is not so good, just a formality to them. If you are going for the college hostel, don't do that.

reviews.review_heading: You can opt for this college if you really want a decent one near the city.
reviews.review_text: The college has a great infrastructure and a great environment for the new students. They have air conditioned classrooms, smart classes, high tech computer labs and a decent library. The hostel is quite good, they have a big mess which provides 3 times meals and the menu changes every day.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus life in GIET .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has well-furnished classrooms with smart-class facilities. The laboratory of my college is well equipped; all computers are working with the latest technology. The entire campus is equipped with Wi-Fi. The college area is very clean and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Nice private college in this location.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of the hostel at this college are quite satisfying. There are AC and non-AC hostels for the students according to their needs. Moreover, the hostel has a 24x7 warden with a faculty teacher visiting the hostel regularly. I surprisingly never faced any kind of ragging in the hostel, and the students also did not try to support it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. The hostel rooms are equipped with air-conditioners. The hostel rooms are non-air-conditioned. The warden is available 24X7. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure is there.
reviews.review_text: As I talk about the course of this college, subjective knowledge is more important than practical knowledge, as today's students understand much more in practical things, so in my opinion, practical knowledge should be given much more importance. Hostel facilities are good, and mess food is also average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Our campus has greenery all around. It is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are also available. Hostel is good. The food served in the mess is average.

paragraphs: Not every student receives a 100% scholarship from GIET Sonepat. It depends on your prior exam scores; if you received 90% or more in class 12, you will be eligible for a 100% first-year scholarship in any B.Tech programme. Try to achieve good grades for a larger scholarship because you will only receive a 25% scholarship of your total costs if your class twelve score is less than or equal to 50%.

The fee structure for a Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) at GIET University, Gunupur is INR 1.95 lakh, plus INR 2.52 Lakhs for hostel fees. This is for the Advantage specialization, which is a three-year course. To be eligible, you must have scored at least 50% in 12th grade. Students must have 45–50% marks in class 12 to be eligible for admission. Reserved category candidates, such as ST, SC, OBC, and others, are eligible for a 5% relaxation. Class 12 students are required to take mathematics. In addition check our website. There you can get a detailed college fee structure.

Yes, they are providing scholarships very recently. State government gives scholarship to every students whose income is less or not having a person who have an govt job in family. reviews.review_text: This college provides excellent infrastructure. The college provides a 24X7 Wi-Fi facility. The laboratories of this college were excellent and with all equipment. In the library all the engineer books were available. Classroom with good furniture and smart classroom. The hostel facility was good for students, and the food availability was good. Medical facilities were available 24X7.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to make your future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for the course are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library. The hostel is available inside the college campus. The mess food is good, and there are many sports to play. In every room of the hostel, there are three beds, and they do cleaning every day. Students go for an outing once a month.

reviews.review_heading: Students do not come to the college regularly.  I am totally satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available, and labs are good. Classrooms are also good here. There is no proper canteen, and the canteen is not owned by our college. Wi-Fi is available in labs. The hostel is average. The food served in the canteen is average. Now construction work is happening in our college and air-conditioned is not working in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with highly qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college should make its infrastructure better for better service. They should also make a snacks canteen for a permanent basis and also the food canteen. The college should not put the fee collection load on lecturers, and they should allow them only for providing better knowledge to students. There is everything on the campus. Canteen facilities are very good. We have our tennis court and a big playground for cricket. New buildings are under construction, which can enhance campus facilities...

reviews.review_text: The college offers a very good atmosphere for study. The college provides great facilities and great teachers. The college management is good. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. This college is perfect for gaining practical knowledge. It is a good place for extracurricular activities. The campus is huge. There is a huge playground. reviews.review_heading: No placements and less practical knowledge is provided.
reviews.review_text: In the front side, the college looks beautiful, but there are no sufficient facilities. Classrooms are good, and the canteen food is very bad. Transportation facility is quite good, but the college is worse for study purpose. There are no sufficient instruments in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: I would like to say nobody should join in this college for the sake of education.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi facility on the campus, and only hostel students were getting the Wi-Fi facility which was also of the medium speed. Sports, games, classroom & labs were also good. The canteen facility was the worst. They overcharge for food, and even, the quality of food was not good.

reviews.review_heading: MEMS is in Banaparia, kuruda, Balasore, and Odisha.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is best, and it is on modifications every year. The library facilities are good. The classroom facilities are also by far the best. The college provides two canteens. One is for general snacks, and another is for the meal. A vast playground is also available where the students who are interested in sports can show their talent.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with my college. Because it cheated me. No placement according to its procurement.

Within a single building, you have all the classrooms, laboratories and an administrative office also. Mechanical and electrical labs do not have enough equipment and no students are allowed to use the Wi-Fi. There are very little facilities for sports and the medical facility is equal to zero.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good for everything.
